auth.title: Auth playbook details

passkeys-more.title: More about passkeys
passkeys-more.content:
Passkey authentication simplifies the login process on iOS and Android devices, eliminating the need for traditional passwords. 
When we detect an already onboarded user wants to log-in, we will prompt them with a passkey challenge to sign-in to your platform. 
This means fewer password-related headaches and enhanced security for all your customers’ online accounts. 
This service has a cost based on the number of auth'd users.
